flashcards.definition: The direction f(x) heads as x → +∞ and x → −∞; determined by degree and leading coefficient.
Both ends rise: as x → ±∞, f(x) → +∞.
Both ends fall: as x → ±∞, f(x) → −∞.
Falls left, rises right: as x → −∞ f(x) → −∞; as x → +∞ f(x) → +∞.
Rises left, falls right: as x → −∞ f(x) → +∞; as x → +∞ f(x) → −∞.
